name: Savory Spaghetti and Meatballs
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the onion soup mix and milk; let stand for 5 minutes.
2. Add the ground beef and egg to the soup mixture; stir until well mixed.
3. Shape into 1-inch balls.
4. In a large skillet, brown the meatballs in hot oil; drain excess fat.
5. Return the meatballs to the skillet.
6. Stir in the spaghetti sauce; bring to a boil.
7. Reduce heat and cover; simmer over medium heat for 15 minutes.
8. While the sauce is simmering, cook the spaghetti according to package directions, omitting salt; drain.
9. Serve the sauce and meatballs over the cooked spaghetti.
